textByHash.e586ebecd9e6394ab4ed4cc915b0088b6f7b0b27: Be nice, Gurt, or you'll scare off another one!
textByHash.7ae8c8f3c9a3e4076802e8823ae8daf8424d912a: I'll take it from here, Gurt.
textByHash.d673ddbe8f7cf08f79c802e83cae696cd1503257: Dis... Sorry, this corner of the Shrouded Ocean is where we Barracudas like to challenge ourselves to a fun Barracuda Trial called the Jubbly Jive.
textByHash.ca428b5d088cd0b68c16c09fb664612a1e2021bb: While he may not look it, Gurtob here is actually an expert sailor and trial master for the Barracudas.
textByHash.0afbdaa25b510145e59b6cf7ac6b52d3682e3467: Not at all! He may be rough around the edges and difficult to understand at times, but he's a fantastic sailor and that's the only thing us Barracudas care about.
textByHash.7b7af35b8642f6c804977c40f6da29d834568bf3: Yes, you'd probably benefit from testing your sailing skills elsewhere before attempting this trial.
textByHash.f0abdb9bc1be24ba69d256526b03d1bf50f51a3f: The goal of this trial is to use balloon toads to lure jubblies. First up, you'll want to sail west to collect da... sorry, collect the balloon toads from a boat of ours.
textByHash.c522a1fb072059aa586e07ce0e4d7005cdea9b6f: On your way, keep an eye out for any lost supplies. You'll need to collect all of them to complete the trial.
textByHash.24935656ef7a027a9493582c6395bcb217c78e46: Sailing over rapids will give you a burst of speed! Try to go over as many as you can. The more rapids you go through in quick succession, the faster you'll go!
textByHash.aa2fe2e5cfec31f764cdd9d47f013b2812ecb92b: As you continue sailing west, keep an eye out for the jubblies. Remembering where they are will help you later in the trial. They tend to be perched on top of rocky outcrops or trees growing out of the water.
textByHash.2ca2a31807658c79dc30f6e896ee4a44ca3bc50f: The total number of them will depend on the rank you're going for. They're also fairly consistent, so your experience should be the same during each trial attempt.
textByHash.e680f9ee201b78d35af10354869430fd223d2f46: Once you've sailed far enough west, you should be able to spot the boat where you can collect the balloon toads from. The maximum amount you can collect depends on the rank you're going for.
textByHash.532c4ab14112a3b70e1810428066340f040ce8b9: Once you've collected some balloon toads, you'll want to start sailing back this way so you can begin luring the jubblies.
textByHash.3497fc7ed56e0b30377f0ca4d33fe9460d685447: As you sail, watch out for the extra thick stagnant patches of water. They'll slow down any boat, so do your best to avoid them.
textByHash.18a5fd2a96249e6d249129c05a004c42f56b2b7c: As you keep making your way back, you'll want to start luring the jubblies back with you. The goal is to lure all of them back to us here.
textByHash.965656795d12299334503c48e7e61d24e44f8f75: To lure a jubbly, look out for empty outcrops similar to the ones they like to perch on. If you throw a balloon toad at one of these outcrops, a nearby jubbly will move to it.
textByHash.bc665ce1131119b6a9fd56e013dcec0b775c3025: It's worth noting that jubblies will only travel to the closest outcrop to them, so you'll need to lure them one outcrop at a time. Make sure to keep track of where you've thrown toads and where the jubblies started.
textByHash.686ecc8631ebfeac7023d2ce23296bc08c70e408: When attempting higher ranks, you may want to set up balloon toads at multiple outcrops ahead of time!
textByHash.1371dbe5619de6af2f976f1b4228eb4a02f09762: While the jubblies are important, don't forget to keep collecting the lost supplies as you come back as well.
textByHash.858f2f7723cf727e00fc7c0efb7642c7d6da1d9c: If you can lure all the jubblies and collect all the lost supplies in the time given, you'll be awarded a Barracuda rank! Each trial has three ranks: Swordfish, Shark or Marlin. Each rank is harder than the last.
textByHash.c8e0f9edcd7853ddb26f582532bdf15857cb77dc: For this trial, you'll be asked to lure additional jubblies and collect even more lost supplies as the rank increases.
textByHash.174f24e37b50db8963b2d9e994a814c250a9148e: You can't attempt the next rank until you beat the one before it. You can also try unranked if you'd like to warm up beforehand.
textByHash.0bafc89c0cd7554c8c6ac0e0262579b6209a721e: First up, you're going to need a boat with at least a mithril helm in order to withstand the strong rapids here, but don't forget, provided you can withstand them, they'll give you a burst of speed!
textByHash.1a2b42c16c0ef1e396f8cde15e801b6cbaabb90e: Secondly, you really want to try to avoid the fetid pools around us. They won't harm you or your boat, but they will completely kill all momentum you've built up.
textByHash.3d2964bd846f79926003b0256f88ef7b5d16e404: The only way to get across them is by using a wind catcher, but even then the timing is tricky, so we only give those out to sailors who have achieved at least Shark rank here.
textByHash.5e1c6aa342ead91d928d501b23e31cc84642a2ca: Thirdly, trim your sails frequently to build up even more speed, but be careful! While it's important to go fast, doing so can make it harder to navigate around the fetid pools.
textByHash.4548ec38bfd2102df54910f1172c93d08ff971f5: If I were you, I'd consider briefly lowering your speed for those tricky turns to avoid getting your boat stuck.
textByHash.4600566fe5ae31e36370f0f951f501c874b65592: Finally, and you probably don't need to be told, but watch out for those rocks, hitting them will put a stop to all of your momentum, just like the pools.
textByHash.2760fe3cd0ad9def2774cd64f9f2fc82c40c811b: You should make sure your helm is manned before starting the trial.
textByHash.dff360f04fbe6c7a8a3ea9562bb89f5121363b8c: For this Barracuda Trial you are not allowed to bring any crewmates.
textByHash.8825875659a26557ec37ee068ccf99ff37c8f797: He's right, you know. Whilst exploring the ocean, a group of Barracudas saw Gurtob 'sailing' around this place on what could barely be described as a boat, hunting jubblies.
textByHash.e37bf085926a8867dfe20a041ec4954a30be46e3: Gurtob friends indeed! When the Barracudas tried it themselves, they realised how much fun it was sailing around these tight spaces. They worked with Gurtob to design this trial!
textByHash.4076ca9e7c8f2a7f32636707e7b94d41a24a1a1f: It's true that some claim the trial is easier now than before due to new pathways being carved through the fetid pools. Still, don't let that fool you! The course is still a tricky one!
textByHash.30ccc59fcce299a712f887f6d327ab90ea41a28b: Let me explain it in non-Gurtob terms...
textByHash.14e9559ada72e62c5a33afb039a418863298f2ed: And I'm Ros. I'm fairly new to the Barracudas and I help Gurtob out with managing this trial.
textByHash.cb4b7c7a5ba1db5c8cc446a0863a0465e8ca4dcb: He's not much of a speaker and is easily misunderstood, so I help translate and make sure that any up and coming prospective Barracudas understand exactly what they need to do.
textByHash.da0be378c7b005741dcccbb653942bc150c2e90e: Well, after joining the Barracudas, I discovered a fascination for different cultures. This is just a small step in my personal journey to understand more about the world!
textByHash.34e5b59534c3870e86ad1f9190461bda4ce4d11d: Plus da jubblies do taste good!
textByHash.2d93a06110637809548ca9274e38f446effc4d0b: Gurtob sure has a way with words!
textByHash.0f18a0751d0f2b10edfe1c3bc4af0fe49f3b5bd7: Us Barracudas are the fastest sailors across the entire ocean! Our motto is 'Anyone from anywhere as long as they can sail.'
textByHash.0915d26e49285ff0dec5ea19053a416d2ceddf29: We work together to help hone each other's skills and test our mettle through challenges called Barracuda Trials.
textByHash.b965961ccd63092d769c65accdccb98a33b5e6de: Of course you can! There's a bunch of trial masters like Gurtob scattered across the seas. Best our trials and earn your spot in our ranks.
